message:
feat(browser): add SharedWorker with OPFS and GPU support

Add production-ready browser worker featuring:
- SharedWorker pattern for cross-tab resource sharing
- OPFS (Origin Private File System) with sync access handles
- GPU Transformer lazy-loading with shared embedding cache
- Stream scanning for large result sets
- SharedArrayBuffer for zero-copy responses (>1KB threshold)
- Multi-tab coordination and isolation
